$comment: Tool declarations for this ratchet. A tool runs by name as tools/<name>.ps1; an entry here adds how to invoke it + its input schema. This template ships the GENERIC tools working and the DOMAIN-SPECIFIC ones as stubs marked CHANGE_ME (build_project = the oracle, new_project = the scaffold, project_api = the API extractor, and the path/extension knobs in stage_and_build/plan_units). Implement those for your language and the lifecycle + composition flows light up. See RatchetBox/dotnet4-x (C#) and RatchetBox/cpp (C++) for full implementations.

tools.name: new_project
tools.description: CHANGE_ME (scaffold): create workspaces/<name> with project.json + PROJECT.md + a src\ entry stub. Arg: name. Set the entry file/extension + any project.json fields build_project needs.

tools.name: build_project
tools.description: CHANGE_ME (THE ORACLE): build the WHOLE project (all of src\) with your toolchain; exit 0 = built, non-zero = failed. Every flow gates on this. Arg: proj (name under workspaces/ or a path).

tools.name: check
tools.description: CHANGE_ME (single-file oracle): syntax/compile-check ONE code snippet (stdin) with your toolchain, no project build; exit 0 = ok. The `generate` one-off flow gates on this.

tools.name: stage_and_build
tools.description: Write a candidate file into a project's src tree, then build the WHOLE project (build_project) and report the verdict. Code on stdin. Generic; tighten the path-guard extensions for your language.

tools.name: project_api
tools.description: CHANGE_ME (domain-specific): emit the public API surface of the project's existing units so a new unit calls them exactly (closes multi-reference drift). C#=regex over .cs; C++=the headers. Arg: proj.

tools.name: read_specs
tools.description: Read every .spec file in a directory (or one .spec file) and print contents labeled by filename, for compose's plan/add_unit steps. Arg: dir (relative to the ratchet root, or absolute). Generic.

tools.name: plan_units
tools.description: Turn a build-plan JSON (stdin) into a foreach worklist: one line per unit in dependency order, '<targetpath> <specfile>'. Generic; set the source extension + entry-file knobs at the top.

tools.name: read_project
tools.description: Context loader: emit PROJECT.md + project.json + the src tree (with roles) + a manifest-drift check; -Include all also dumps every src file. Language-agnostic. Arg: proj [include].

tools.name: register_file
tools.description: Record a newly added file in a project's on-disk memory (project.json.files + PROJECT.md). Idempotent. Generic. Args: proj, path, role.

tools.name: log_edit
tools.description: Append an 'edited' line to a project's PROJECT.md changelog. Generic. Args: proj, path, summary.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Print one project source file verbatim, to ground a surgical edit on its exact current contents. Generic. Args: proj, path.
